Program searches for ALL odd holes and odd antiholes

CPXPARAM_MIP_Limits_Solutions                    1
CPXPARAM_TimeLimit                               900
Generic callback                                 0x20
Lazy constraint(s) or lazy constraint/branch callback is present.
    Disabling dual reductions (CPX_PARAM_REDUCE) in presolve.
    Disabling presolve reductions that prevent crushing forms (CPX_PARAM_PREREFORM).
Tried aggregator 1 time.

MIP Presolve modified 1401 coefficients.

Parallel mode: deterministic, using up to 24 threads.
